title: Searching people in workform with the second attribut (job title by default)

posts.author: thomasgaillard (Thomas Gaillard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, with a people column, we could search people by the nam and the second attribute in () which is the job title by default.
This is very convenient in everey “array view”.
But in workform (idea form) we can’t (the research is possible only with the name)

Thanks
